body_txt: There are some things you just can't plan for . An opponent from completely outside your genre is one of them. A cowboy is not expecting to fight demons, a demon is not expecting to fight aliens. In more mild cases, this simply requires a readjustment of tactics, but more extreme situations (such as Cthulhu showing up on a Buddy Cop Show ) are simply going to end quickly and messily. Subtrope of Outside-Context Problem and Genre Refugee ; supertrope to Knight of Cerebus , Vile Villain, Saccharine Show and Cosmic Horror Reveal . Often a Giant Space Flea from Nowhere if it's a video game Boss Battle . Compare to Ultimate Showdown of Ultimate Destiny .
